# Azilsartan Medoxomil 相關新聞

[← 返回新聞總覽]({{ '/news/' | relative_url }})

---

<p class="key-answer" data-question="Azilsartan Medoxomil 有什麼相關新聞？">
<strong>Azilsartan Medoxomil</strong> 目前有 <strong>27 則</strong>相關新聞報導，預測適應症 20 個。
</p>

<div class="key-takeaway">
本頁整合 Azilsartan Medoxomil 的 AI 預測適應症與最新健康新聞，橘色標示的適應症表示近期有相關新聞報導。
</div>

<div class="drug-info-card">
<strong>藥物資訊</strong>
<ul>
<li><strong>原適應症</strong>：Edarbi is indicated for the treatment of essential hypertension in adults.</li>
<li><strong>證據等級</strong>：L5</li>
<li><strong>預測適應症</strong>（20 個）：<ul>
<li>hypertensive disorder（98.0%）</li>
<li>pulmonary hypertension with unclear multifactorial mechanism（97.8%）</li>
<li>pulmonary hypertension owing to lung disease and/or hypoxia（97.8%）</li>
<li>malignant renovascular hypertension（97.7%）</li>
<li>malignant hypertensive renal disease（97.7%）</li>
<li>Braddock syndrome（97.2%）</li>
<li>cerebrovascular disorder（94.6%）</li>
<li>obsolete susceptibility to ischemic stroke（92.7%）</li>
<li>chronic pulmonary heart disease（91.8%）</li>
<li>brain stem infarction（87.7%）</li>
<li>hypotrichosis simplex of the scalp（85.0%）</li>
<li>intracerebral hemorrhage（85.0%）</li>
<li>congenital hypotrichosis milia（81.2%）</li>
<li>cerebral artery occlusion（78.7%）</li>
<li>ABri amyloidosis（77.2%）</li>
<li>alopecia（74.6%）</li>
<li>MRI defined brain infarct（70.9%）</li>
<li>diffuse alopecia areata（70.9%）</li>
<li>primary hereditary glaucoma（60.5%）</li>
<li>congenital temporomandibular joint ankylosis（60.1%）</li>
</ul></li>
</ul>
<p><a href="{{ '/drugs/azilsartan-medoxomil/' | relative_url }}">查看完整藥物報告 →</a></p>
</div>
